## Source: ossf-package-analysis (a1ea971c27301281014c26314bf53df0b7410c912d2f47181c9c4546284466d8)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-spokesd-core' @ 1.0.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
